source.title: Heimao 2025 Double 11 Consumer Complaint Data Report

extractions.claim: During 2025 Double 11, e-commerce complaints on Heimao reached 183,867, up 22.7% from prior period
extractions.evidence: 双11期间，电商平台在黑猫平台的投诉量高达183,867件，较上期增长22.72%

extractions.claim: 2025 Double 11 complaint share by platform: Douyin 28.6% (~53K), Taobao/Tmall 24.5% (~45K), Pinduoduo 18.3% (~33.6K), JD 16.1% (~29.6K)
extractions.evidence: 抖音商城投诉量高居第一(28.61%)，淘宝含天猫位居次席(24.50%)，拼多多(18.27%)，京东(16.09%)

verification.verifier_notes: Pinduoduo is 3rd, NOT #1 in complaint volume during Double 11 2025. Douyin overtook as most-complained platform.

extractions.claim: Complaint response rates (Double 11 2025): Douyin/Dewu/Kuaishou/Xiaohongshu ~99%, Pinduoduo ~70%, JD <30%, Taobao/Tmall <10%
extractions.evidence: 抖音商城、得物、快手商城和小红书商城的投诉回复率均在99%左右，拼多多则接近70%。京东不足30%，淘宝（含天猫）不足10%

verification.verifier_notes: Pinduoduo's 70% response rate is significantly better than Taobao (<10%) and JD (<30%), though below newer platforms
